commands.repair_reason: Human handling is needed for contributor real behavior proof or an explicit maintainer proof override; automation cannot generate the contributor's real voice-session evidence.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the diff reduces exposure of internal policy diagnostics to model-facing voice prompts. (sha=e3057684efed28370958819ccba79241c7c9987f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Discord and voice-call realtime forced-consult fallback handling so internal consult-policy diagnostics are logged privately instead of being sent through model-facing prompt or consult payloads.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main appends internal forced-consult diagnostics to the Discord agent message and passes the same policy reason as voice-call consult context.
commands.review_followup: Human handling is needed for contributor real behavior proof or an explicit maintainer proof override; automation cannot generate the contributor's real voice-session evidence.

target.title: fix(discord): keep forced voice consult diagnostics private
target.body:
## Summary
- Stop forced Discord realtime consult fallbacks from appending internal consult-policy diagnostics to the agent-facing voice prompt.
- Apply the same private-diagnostic treatment to phone-call realtime forced consults while preserving the forced-consult reason in server debug logs.
- Rebase onto current `upstream/main`, resolve the voice-call test-helper conflict, and keep the Unreleased changelog entry.

## Verification
- Node 24.14.0: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.e2e.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- Node 24.14.0: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-voice-call.config.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check CHANGELOG.md extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.e2e.test.ts extensions/discord/src/voice/realtime.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/webhook/realtime-handler.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Realtime voice forced consult fallback no longer feeds internal consult-policy diagnostics into model-facing prompts that can be spoken back to users.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout rebased onto `upstream/main` at `00388134c4`, using mocked Discord realtime voice and voice-call realtime provider harnesses on Node 24.14.0.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the full Discord voice manager e2e file, the full voice-call realtime handler test file, touched-file oxfmt, `git diff --check`, and autoreview after resolving the rebase conflict.
Evidence after fix: Discord regression asserts the agent command message is exactly `What?` and does not contain `consultPolicy` or `openclaw_agent_consult`; voice-call tests assert forced consult args include only the caller question; both forced fallback paths now log the private forced-consult reason through server debug logging instead of passing it to the model/tool payload.
Observed result after fix: Discord voice manager e2e file passed 87/87; voice-call realtime handler test file passed 18/18; touched files are oxfmt-clean; diff whitespace check passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
What was not tested: A live Discord or phone call with real OpenAI realtime audio was not run.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.author: Takhoffman
